home.subtitle: What would you like to record today?

importAudio.title: Import Audio
importAudio.description: The audio has been imported successfully. You can rename it before starting the transcription.

recordButton.errorNoMic: Please select a microphone in settings

recordingOverlay.confirmDiscardMessage: All data from this recording will be lost.

settings.title: AIRecorder Settings
settings.subtitle: Settings
settings.description: Manage your app preferences and AI configurations.

helpText.uiLanguage: Language in which the application is displayed.
helpText.fontSize: Adjusts the font size for chats, transcriptions and summaries.
helpText.microphone: Select the input device for your recordings.
helpText.whisperModel: Choose the default model for new transcriptions. Smaller models are faster but less accurate.
helpText.cpuThreads: More threads increase transcription speed but use more computer resources.
helpText.ragModel: Specific model for answering RAG queries (e.g.: deepseek-r1). Leave empty to use the main model.
helpText.generalModel: Model used for summaries, analysis and processing tasks.
helpText.chatModel: Model used for chat conversations. If empty, the General Model will be used.
helpText.embeddingModel: Model used for indexing and searching fragments (e.g.: nomic-embed-text).
helpText.databasePath: Change where the database is stored. Default location is recommended.
helpText.contextLengthInput: Leave empty to detect automatically on each generation, or enter the value manually.
helpText.contextLengthOllama: Find it by running: ollama show <model> --verbose (num_ctx field)
helpText.contextLengthLmStudio: Find it in LM Studio, under "My Models" → advanced options of the loaded model.

messages.checkUpdatesDefault: Check if a newer version is available
messages.modelError: Could not load models. Check your API Key.

notifications.title: Desktop Notifications
notifications.desc: Show native notifications when tasks complete

micAccess.title: Microphone Access
micAccess.desc: Required to record your voice during meetings.

misc.directoryNotSupported: Directory selection is not supported in this environment
misc.changeDbAskMigrate: Do you want to copy the current database to the new location?

aiQueue.title: Process Monitor
aiQueue.subtitle: Track and manage your AI tasks.
aiQueue.noTaskData: No data saved for this task.

projects.title: Projects Library
projects.emptyDesc: Create your first project to organize your recordings

projects.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this project?

projects.changeProjectText1: The recording "{{recordingName}}" is already assigned to project "{{currentProjectName}}".
projects.changeProjectText2: Do you want to move it to "{{newProjectName}}"?
projects.deleteProjectConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? Recordings will not be deleted.
projects.unassignConfirm: Are you sure you want to unassign "{{recordingName}}" from project "{{projectName}}"?

newSessionCard.title: New Session
newSessionCard.description: Start recording instantly. Our AI will handle transcription, summarization, and key point extraction automatically.

transcriptionQueue.subtitle: Managing {{count}} active tasks
transcriptionQueue.confirmCancel: Are you sure you want to cancel this task?

finish.title: You're All Set!
finish.subtitle: AIRecorder has been successfully configured. You are ready to start recording and transcribing your meetings with the power of AI.
finish.changeNote: You can change these settings later in the preferences menu.

welcome.title: Welcome to
welcome.subtitle: Your intelligent recording assistant
welcome.description: Record meetings, automatically transcribe and extract insights with AI.
welcome.terms: By continuing, you agree to our

mic.title: Microphone Setup
mic.desc: We'll test your input device for optimal recording quality.

ai.title: AI Customization
ai.desc: Tailor the transcription engine to recognize your voice patterns.

workspace.title: Workspace Organization
workspace.desc: Setup where your projects and transcripts will live.

ai.title: Configure your AI Intelligence
ai.subtitle: Choose how AIRecorder processes your audio. You can change this later in settings.
ai.betaWarning: Cloud providers are currently in beta testing. Some features may not work as expected.

ollama.subtitle: Self-hosted processing
ollama.description: Run AI entirely on your machine. Ideal for total privacy and offline workflows, but requires powerful hardware.
ollama.chatModelHelp: For chat conversations. Empty = uses General Model.

lmstudio.subtitle: Self-hosted processing
lmstudio.description: Run GGUF models via LM Studio's local server. Provides a simple GUI for downloading and managing models.
lmstudio.urlNote: * Default URL. You can change this in the app settings later.

gemini.description: Google's Gemini models. Requires a Google AI Studio API key.

kimi.description: Kimi models by Moonshot AI. Requires a Moonshot API key.

deepseek.description: DeepSeek models. Requires a DeepSeek API key.

permissions.title: Enable Permissions
permissions.subtitle: To record and transcribe your audio accurately, AIRecorder needs access to your system devices. We value your privacy and only record when you tell us to.
permissions.micDesc: Required to record your voice during meetings.
permissions.systemAudioDesc: System audio capture is handled automatically. No additional permissions required.
permissions.notifDesc: Get alerts when transcription is ready.

storage.title: Configure Storage
storage.subtitle: Choose where to save your recordings and database. You can use the default values.

aiInfo.title: The power of AI on your machine
aiInfo.subtitle: AIRecorder uses local Artificial Intelligence models to guarantee 100% privacy for your transcripts and summaries. No data ever leaves your computer.
aiInfo.whatIsLocalAiDesc: Instead of sending your audio to external company servers (like OpenAI or Google), we process the information using tools installed on your own machine.
aiInfo.ollamaDesc: The easiest way to run models in your terminal. Highly recommended for its ease of use.
aiInfo.lmstudioDesc: Powerful graphical interface for downloading and managing advanced GGUF models.
aiInfo.normalModelsDesc: Responsible for reading your transcripts, generating summaries, meeting minutes, and answering your questions in the chat.
aiInfo.embeddingModelsDesc: They convert your texts into mathematical coordinates. This allows the AI to quickly "search" through all your past recordings (RAG) to give you accurate answers.
aiInfo.docsNote: Will open in your web browser
aiInfo.noInstallDesc: We recommend pausing for a moment, following our guide, and installing Ollama before continuing.
